1: From him cometh cometh my salvation.
2: He is He is my defence; I shall not be greatly moved.
3: Ye shall be slain all of you: As a bowing wall shall ye be, and as shall ye be, and as a tottering fence.
4: They delight in lies: They bless with their mouth, but they curse inwardly. Selah. Selah.
5: For my expectation is is from him.
6: He is He is my defence; I shall not be moved.
7: The rock of my strength, and and my refuge, is is in God.
8: Pour out your heart before him: God is is a refuge for us. Selah. Selah.
9: and and men of high degree are are a lie: To be laid in the balance, they are are altogether lighter lighter than vanity.
10: If riches increase, set not your heart upon them upon them .
11: That power belongeth belongeth unto God.
12: For thou renderest to every man according to his work.
